prompt: For a heritage inventory, identify the authoritative body responsible for the Loomlight Textile Museum in Ashbourne, then fetch an official design dossier or property register that names its original lead architect. Do not substitute the builder or a later restoration architect. Also say whether that record names the structural engineer; if it does not, write “structural engineer: not stated” rather than guessing.

fetch_primary.title: Loomlight Textile Museum original design dossier
fetch_primary.content: The signed design dossier credits Priya Deshmukh as lead architect for the original Loomlight Textile Museum. It names North Quay Works as the builder and does not identify a structural engineer.
